subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Abha Beauty - may my spirit be sacrificed for His loved ones! - blessed are ye who are intoxicated with the cup of His bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جمال ابهى روحى لاحبائه الفدآء خوشا بحال شما که از ساغر عنایتش سرمستید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
